name: Indian Bank
summary: Indian Bank provides various banking product and services. The company provides deposit products, including savings and current accounts, term deposits, and Non Resident Indian (NRI) accounts. It also offers agriculture, group, personal/individual, micro small and medium enterprises, education, and NRI loans. In addition, the company provides Internet and mobile banking, as well as Ministry of Corporate Affairs payment, money gram, money transfer, remittance, and multicity check facility services; debit and credit cards; insurance services; direct and indirect tax payment services; debenture trustee services; and merchant banking and housing finance services. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 2,887 branches comprising 740 rural, 833 semi urban, 637 urban, and 677 metropolitan branches in India; 3 foreign branches in Singapore, Colombo, and Jaffna; and 4059 automated teller machines. Indian Bank was founded in 1907 and is based in Chennai, India.
